build.beforeDevCommand: bun run src-tauri/scripts/touch-sidecar.mjs && bun run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: bun run build && bun run src-tauri/scripts/prepare-sidecar.mjs

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
